author: anon-a7c6025f
content: The current fast_sigmoid does negateâ†’allocâ†’SIMD expâ†’reciprocal = 3 passes + 2 allocations. PyTorch does sigmoid in one fused pass with a polynomial approximation. Plan: write fused single-pass SIMD kernels for sigmoid, sin, cos that process 4/8 f32s at a time without intermediate buffers. Use the Cody-Waite + minimax polynomial approach.
